RT @mrejfox: I tried to long-form some of my thinking about the origins of the internet and how that informs how we should be approaching i…

A more shapeable human-scaled internet doesn’t mean building everything new yourself. It means finding online companies you trust to be good partners & stewards of your info. @AREdotNA and @Pinboard are great examples. https://t.co/0iEo1Rou43

It feels good to reclaim the presentation of my online ideas / inspiration. Incredibly easy too. I am basically just using these other sites as databases/interfaces. I own all my data still and can move it and modify it as I see fit. https://t.co/YrAtmdbcQc
I also added a new visual moodboard / Tumblr replacement powered by an @AREdotNA channel https://t.co/W7Q8AoRhGA https://t.co/wPO11av2e8
Added a new bookmarks section to my personal site, powered by pinboard, as a better way to display my ongoing research and notes https://t.co/InTJJSkuZf https://t.co/c1k4DulFXB
